name: THE DECISION MEMO

sections.guidance: The decision to be made, phrased as a choice.
The comparison chart(s) that make the options commensurable.
2 to 4 options, each with cost, benefit, and risk in the same units.
The decision mechanics: who chooses, by when, what happens on no decision.

example: Which routing do we commit for Q4?
Cost and duration per option CH-MAG-02
Option A faster but 21 k$ over; option B on budget, 2 weeks slower
Steering committee decides Thursday; default is B
qa: no hidden favorite in the wording
